rationale.R1.2: The agent correctly identifies logical consistency issues, but some of the proposed repairs are not fully supported by the evidence.
rationale.RX.1: The agent accurately flags uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims and marks confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stays within scope with one minor drift in the explanation for the predictive-LP claim.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies some harm-free but with one minor regression, but could be more explicit about the nature of the regression.
rationale.RX.5: The agent annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, but could improve on tracing major rewrites.
